title: Logan Stanhope Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Logan Stanhope Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Logan Stanhope
Undergraduate Student
BS in Computer Science ’26
Boston Campus
In high school, Logan Stanhope’s dad encouraged her to pursue computer science as a way to bridge her passions for math and problem solving. Now studying on Khoury College’s Boston campus, she’s found a supportive community that’s helped her build confidence while gaining new skills in these areas.
Being able to look up to a role model who was my professor and who was also a woman gave me a lot of confidence in what I was doing and that I actually belonged here
Logan Stanhope, BSCS ’26
Explore all Khoury Stories
